successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave-application.service.ts exists and exports ILeaveApplicationService interface and LeaveApplicationService class with all method signatures
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with create, update, findById, and findByEmployeeId methods
All method implementations throw Error('Method not implemented') as placeholders
Transaction semantics are explicitly documented: createLeaveRequest, submitLeaveRequest, and cancelLeaveRequest execute atomically in a single database transaction
All dependencies are properly typed in the constructor: ILeaveRepository, PolicyService, BalanceService, AuditLogger, EventPublisher

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (GP-001)
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record (GP-002)
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (GP-003)
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data (GP-004)
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control (GP-005)
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled (GP-006)
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, leave -> notification
LeaveRequest lifecycle states are Pending, Approved, and Rejected
Balance deductions occur only during approveLeaveRequest
Notifications are created on submission, approval, and rejection events
outOfScope: Implementation of method logic (deferred to Phase 5)
Leave controllers and API endpoints (deferred to Phase 8)
Any changes to employee, policy, balance, or notification modules
